sn48.39:0.3: Sutta An Analysis (of the Feeling Faculties) (4)
sn48.39:1.3: The pleasure-faculty, the pain-faculty, the happiness-faculty, the distress-faculty, the equanimity-faculty.
sn48.39:1.4: “In dependence on a contact to be experienced as pleasure, the pleasure-faculty arises.
sn48.39:1.5: Being eased, one discerns, ‘I am eased.’
sn48.39:1.6: With the cessation of that very contact to be experienced as pleasure, one discerns, ‘What was experienced as coming from that—the pleasure-faculty arising in dependence on a contact to be experienced as pleasure—ceases & grows still.’
sn48.39:2.1: “In dependence on a contact to be experienced as pain, the pain-faculty arises.
sn48.39:2.2: Being pained, one discerns, ‘I am pained.’
sn48.39:2.3: With the cessation of that very contact to be experienced as pain, one discerns, ‘What was experienced as coming from that—the pain-faculty arising in dependence on a contact to be experienced as pain—ceases & grows still.’
sn48.39:3.1: “In dependence on a contact to be experienced as happiness, the happiness-faculty arises.
sn48.39:3.2: Being happy, one discerns, ‘I am happy.’
sn48.39:3.3: With the cessation of that very contact to be experienced as happiness, one discerns, ‘What was experienced as coming from that—the happiness-faculty arising in dependence on a contact to be experienced as happiness—ceases & grows still.’
sn48.39:4.1: “In dependence on a contact to be experienced as distress, the distress-faculty arises.
sn48.39:4.2: Being distressed, one discerns, ‘I am distressed.’
sn48.39:4.3: With the cessation of that very contact to be experienced as distress, one discerns, ‘What was experienced as coming from that—the distress-faculty arising in dependence on a contact to be experienced as distress—ceases & grows still.’
sn48.39:5.1: “In dependence on a contact to be experienced as equanimity, the equanimity-faculty arises.
sn48.39:5.2: Being equanimous, one discerns, ‘I am equanimous.’
sn48.39:5.3: With the cessation of that very contact to be experienced as equanimity, one discerns, ‘What was experienced as coming from that—the equanimity-faculty arising in dependence on a contact to be experienced as equanimity—ceases & grows still.’
sn48.39:6.1: “Just as when, from the conjunction & combining of two fire sticks, heat is generated & fire produced, while from the separation & laying down of those fire sticks the heat coming from them ceases & grows still;
sn48.39:6.2: in the same way, in dependence on a contact to be experienced as pleasure, the pleasure-faculty arises…
sn48.39:7.1: “In dependence on a contact to be experienced as pain, the pain-faculty arises…
sn48.39:7.2: “In dependence on a contact to be experienced as happiness, the happiness-faculty arises…
sn48.39:7.3: “In dependence on a contact to be experienced as distress, the distress-faculty arises…
sn48.39:7.4: “In dependence on a contact to be experienced as equanimity, the equanimity-faculty arises.
sn48.39:7.5: Being equanimous, one discerns, ‘I am equanimous.’
sn48.39:7.6: With the cessation of that very contact to be experienced as equanimity, one discerns, ‘What was experienced as coming from that—the equanimity-faculty arising in dependence on a contact to be experienced as equanimity—ceases & grows still.’”
